caption: A man with a beard and short hair is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "FitThenic". A professional condenser microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of him. His arms, which feature several tattoos, are partially visible. As the scene progresses, the man shifts his position; he initially looks forward and then raises his right hand to touch the top of his head, adjusting his headphones or scratching his scalp. Throughout these movements, he maintains a focused expression and keeps his gaze directed slightly off-camera. The lighting is consistent and soft, and the background remains static as the man performs these slight gestures.
